sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) muster, enumeration (see the root 1, c), 1Ch 23:11.

(2) care, oversight (see the root 1, d), Job 10:12 specially custody, ward, i.q. מִשְׁמָר, מִשְׁמֶרֶת 2Ki 11:18 2Ch 23:18 בֵּית הַפְּקֻדֹּות house of custody, a prison, Jer 52:11.

(3) office, charge, oversight (root 2, a), Num. 4:16 2Ch 23:18 Psa 109:8. Concr. officers, 2Ch 24:11 Isa 60:17.

(4) riches, which any one lays up (by him), and guards, Isa 15:7.

(5) punishment (see the root No. 3), Isa 10:3 pl. Eze 9:1.
